title: bulbophyllum sandrangatense
intro: Bulbophyllum sandrangatense, also known as the Madagascar orchid or Sandranaka orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid that has been traditionally used in the Malagasy culture for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum sandrangatense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
